_comment: Baseline throughput thresholds keyed by TOPOLOGY_LABEL/VARIANT. analyze.py uses these for regression gating. null values are skipped (SKIP, not FAIL) — seed them with: python3 scripts/perf/analyze/analyze.py --update-baseline --out <run-dir> --baseline scripts/perf/benchmarks/baseline.json

two-node/never.source: scripts/perf/runbooks/findings-summary.md — locks-off control, same ceiling as auto (Apr 2026)

single-node/default.source: scripts/perf/runbooks/findings-summary.md — single-node EC:1 two local disks (Apr 2026)

three-node/always.source: TODO: seed after first three-node run with --update-baseline

three-node/auto.source: TODO: seed after first three-node run with --update-baseline

three-node/never.source: TODO: seed after first three-node run with --update-baseline
